request.prompt: Create the directory D:/Projects/TitantShift/Testing/matrix-20260420-045217/P1_frontend_quality/landing and write one self-contained HTML file to D:/Projects/TitantShift/Testing/matrix-20260420-045217/P1_frontend_quality/landing/index.html. Use exactly this structure: html/head/meta viewport/title/style/body/main/h1/p/button/inline svg. Style requirements: responsive layout, clear typography, and one gradient background. Use create_directory then write_file only. Do not create any other files or directories.
